_comment: Domain icon manifest for Novus Mundus. Two sets: 'relief' (rich bronze-medallion PNGs for showcase surfaces — buffs, resources, currency) and 'flat' (2-tone heraldic glyphs traced to SVG for dense utility surfaces — weapon types, map cells). generate-icons.sh reads this; export-icons-to-app.sh post-processes raw output into apps/web/public/img/icons/. Each icon has a fixed seed so re-runs are deterministic and regenerating one icon never disturbs the rest.
preamble: Single game UI icon. One isolated symbolic subject, centered, no scene.

style.relief: Style: the subject rendered as a single raised bronze relief object — one sculpted bronze item alone, with subtle metallic depth and micro-shadows, lit warmly from the upper left. Absolutely NO coin, no disc, no circle, no medallion, no round plate, no frame, nothing behind it — only the item itself, floating isolated in empty space. Color: warm polished bronze and aged gold (#C9A961) on a pure flat solid black background.
style.flat: Style: a single engraved heraldic glyph and nothing else — no coin, no disc, no enclosing circle, no border or frame. Single-weight clean crisp vector-like line work, flat with no gradient and no shading, bold and legible when shrunk to a small size. Color: solid antique gold (#C9A961) on a pure solid black background.
style.nav: Style: an extremely minimal navigation icon — one bold, simple silhouette built from as few single-weight line strokes as possible. No internal detail, no double lines, no flourishes, no fill, no shading. Drawn like a modern app tab-bar icon that stays crisp and unmistakable when shrunk to 20 pixels. Color: a clean solid antique gold (#C9A961) line on a pure flat solid black background.
style.nav-filled: Style: a bold minimal navigation icon built from SOLID FILLED shapes — every shape is a solid filled silhouette, completely filled in, never a hollow outline and never thin line work. Flat, no shading, no gradient. Simple and legible when shrunk to 20 pixels. Color: solid antique gold (#C9A961) filled shapes on a pure flat solid black background.

tail: Composition: perfectly centered, square 1:1, the icon fills the central portion of the frame on a clean uniform solid black background. Icon only — absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no clutter, one subject only.

icons.subject: A single upright broadsword blade, edge catching the light.
A heavy heraldic tower shield, face forward.
A drawstring coin pouch, plump and overflowing with coins at the mouth.
A radiant rising star with a trailing upward spark.
A blacksmith's anvil.
A war banner on a pole, cloth furled by wind.
A concentric target struck dead-center by an arrowhead.
Two interlocking gear wheels meshed together.
A bound treasure chest, lid closed, iron-strapped and full.
A whetstone with a dagger blade drawn across it, sparks rising.
A winged boot, single feathered wing at the heel.
A tied sheaf of ripe wheat stalks.
A tight fan of three upright infantry spears.
A fanged beast skull pierced through by a spearhead.
An open treasure chest with faceted gems spilling over the rim.
A polished knight's breastplate cuirass, front view.
A miner's pickaxe crossed over a raw ore nugget.
A fish hooked on a curved fishing hook.
Two crossed swords behind a victor's laurel wreath.
A heater shield cracked and broken, split by a deep jagged fracture down the middle.
Two sword blades crossed and clashing edge to edge, a burst of sparks where they meet.
The Novus Mundus logo mark — the NOVI token icon, placed from the canonical bronze logo asset (no coin).
a single faceted brilliant-cut gemstone
a small heap of three or four overlapping round coins, a clear realistic pile of gold money (not abstract, not a glyph)
a single tied sheaf of ripe wheat
a single bold lightning bolt
a small cluster of three jagged crystal shards
A foot-soldier's heater shield with two infantry spears crossed behind it, a kettle helm resting at its base. No people, no figures, no face — equipment only.
A cavalry lance carrying a swallow-tailed war pennon, crossed with a riding stirrup and a spur. No horse, no people, no figures, no face — rider's equipment only.
A counterweight trebuchet, its throwing arm raised and the sling hanging from the tip, heavy timber frame. No people, no figures, no face — the engine only.
A laborer's pickaxe crossed with a shovel, a woven carrying basket resting at their base. No people, no figures, no face — tools only.
A woodworker's mallet crossed with a hand plane, a chisel and a pair of calipers resting at their base. No people, no figures, no face — tools only.
An engineer's toothed gear wheel with a draughtsman's compass and set-square over it, a rolled blueprint at the base. No people, no figures, no face — instruments only.
A knight's longsword crossed with a broad war axe. No people, no figures, no face — weapons only.
A recurve war bow with a full quiver of arrows leaning against it. No people, no figures, no face — equipment only.
A heavy windlass crossbow, an arbalest, with a small bundle of bolts at its base. No people, no figures, no face — the weapon only.
A crested knight's great helm with a draped mail coif beside it. The helm is empty and hollow — no head, no face, no figure inside. Armour only.

A heavy four-wheeled troop transport wagon — long timber bed with raised side rails and an open back board for soldiers to ride, a single tall spoked wheel angled in the foreground, a stacked yoke and harness traces draped over the front board, two infantry shields and a row of upright spears propped along the bench seat. No people, no figures, no face, no beasts — the wagon and tack and weapons only.

A cairn — a stack of smooth flat weathered stones balanced into a tapering tower, the largest stone at the bottom and the smallest on top. Just the stack of stones and nothing else. No people, no figures, no face.
A radiant compass star with a single arrowhead replacing the north tip, pointing forward and slightly upward. No coin, no disc, no medallion behind it.
A single broad arrowhead embedded dead-center in a concentric struck target, the rings cracked outward from the impact.
A heavy heater shield face-forward, a single arrow snapped in half across its face with both broken pieces hanging loose against the shield.
An open stone doorway cut into a wall, a heavy iron key resting in the lock at the latch, light spilling forward through the open gap.
A burst leather coin pouch with three coins lifting in mid-air above its open mouth, the drawstring snapped and trailing.
Three jagged crystal shards arranged in a tight triangular cluster, the largest shard upright in the centre and the two smaller shards flanking it.
Two swords crossed in a saltire.
A drawn longbow with a single nocked arrow.
A torsion catapult with its throwing arm cocked back.
A plain heater shield, face forward.
A five-point heraldic crown.
A single miner's pickaxe, head up.
Two crossed war axes.
A merchant's balance scale with two pans hanging level.
The Novus Mundus logo mark — used as the home/brand anchor tab, copied from the canonical vector logo, not generated.
Two crossed swords forming a simple X, each sword one clean stroke.
A single castle tower with a few blocky crenellations on top.
A compass rose — a radial star with a prominent north point and cardinal spokes.

Four heraldic shields in a tight two-by-two overlapping cluster — two shields on the upper row and two on the lower row, overlapping and layered into one compact square block. Each shield a SOLID FILLED shape, flat-topped with a pointed bottom.
A shopping bag with two curved handles — a bold solid filled silhouette.
A treasure chest.
A calendar page.
A two-handled trophy cup.
A single gear cog wheel.
A crested knight's helmet.
A human skull.
A three-pronged trident.
A triangular pennant flag on a pole.
A simple crown.
